rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and data types.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Write assumptions with concrete bounds or named constants in AGREE contracts.
Ensure output guarantees relate visible inputs to visible outputs without using implementation-only paths.
Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `guarantee` for output dependency contracts.
Boolean expressions in AGREE should only use AGREE bool types or valid visible Boolean features.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not attempt to convert Boolean domain values into integers unless numeric scalar representation is provided.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens such as ms/us/Hz/Bytes
Model Analyst Agent extraction of component structure
